privileged_info_summary: This is a domain-driven design (DDD) event storming diagram task that uses synthetically generated data. The task creates a library loan system event storming transcript with a strict legend defining eight element types and their hex color codes. The metadata claims five element types: Event (#FF9900 orange), Command (#0099FF blue), Aggregate (#FFFF99 yellow), Policy (#CC00CC purple), and System (#FFCCE6 pink). All claimed color codes and file paths have been verified against the setup script and match the verifier expectations exactly. The task files are created dynamically at runtime from setup_task.sh, not sourced from external datasets.
